indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for placing a yoga mat.

indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: There is ample open space on the floor, allowing for various yoga poses without obstruction.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light from the large windows can create a calming atmosphere for yoga practice.

indicators.name: cabinets and shelves
indicators.rationale: Cabinets and shelves on the walls can obstruct the open floor space and create visual clutter.

indicators.name: kitchen appliances
indicators.rationale: The presence of kitchen appliances like a refrigerator and sink can make the space less suitable for yoga.

reasoning_summary: The scene has some positive aspects for yoga, such as hardwood flooring and open floor space, but also has some negative factors like cabinets and kitchen appliances that obstruct the open space and create visual clutter. Overall, it is marginally adequate for yoga practice.
